title: cyclosorus clemensiae
intro: Cyclosorus clemensiae is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus clemensiae include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Cyclosorus clemensiae can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia.
